caption: The video appears to be a news segment featuring an interview with Tejashwi Yadav, the former Deputy Chief Minister of Bihar. The setting is outdoors, possibly in a park or a similar open area, with trees and some people in the background. Tejashwi is being interviewed by a reporter holding a microphone with the ANI logo on it. The screen displays various political figures, including Nitish Kumar, Samrat Choudhuri, Vijay Sinha, Prem Kumar, and Vijay Choudhuri, suggesting that the discussion might revolve around political developments or events involving these individuals. The text on the screen indicates that the conversation could be about political alliances or conflicts, as phrases like "सीधी धमकी" (direct threat) and "पिक्चर बाकी है" (the picture remains unclear) suggest tension or uncertainty in the political landscape. The time displayed on the screen is 10:04 PM and 10:05 PM, indicating that this is a live or recorded broadcast during the evening.
